subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! The universal grace is manifest in its entirety, and the all-embracing Word shines forth in its fullness, the ancient bounty in its most glorious manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حبیبا فضل کلیه بکله ظاهر و کلمه جامعه بتمامه باهر عنایت قدیمه بابهی ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
